diagrams.title: FIFO Creation and Access
diagrams.description: Shows how a FIFO is created in filesystem and accessed by processes
elements: FIFO file in /tmp or working directory
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how FIFOs persist and are accessed by unrelated processes

diagrams.title: Client-Server Model with FIFOs
diagrams.description: Architecture of client-server communication using two FIFOs
diagrams.purpose: Understanding practical IPC design patterns with FIFOs

diagrams.title: FIFO Blocking States
diagrams.description: Shows different blocking scenarios when opening/reading/writing FIFOs
elements: Open for reading - blocks until writer
Open for writing - blocks until reader

diagrams.title: Bidirectional Communication
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how to achieve bidirectional communication avoiding deadlock
